mapper.select: SELECT * FROM class_scores WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY ranking

SELECT cs.* FROM class_scores cs INNER JOIN inspection_records ir ON cs.record_id = ir.id WHERE cs.class_id = #{classId} AND ir.inspection_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND ir.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND cs.deleted = 0 AND ir.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ir.inspection_date
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO class_scores (id, record_id, class_id, base_score, total_deduction, final_score, weighted_score, ranking, rating_level, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.recordId}, #{item.classId}, #{item.baseScore}, #{item.totalDeduction}, #{item.finalScore}, #{item.weightedScore}, #{item.ranking}, #{item.ratingLevel}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, 0)
